NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BELOUSOVA, NATALYA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BROWN, ARLENE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, NEITHER SIDE MET THE BURDEN OF PROOF REGARDING THE LANDLORD'S PURPORTED AGREEMENT WITH THE SF HOUSING AUTHORITY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 3/26/2014. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TIME PAYMENTS (SC-222).THE REQUEST IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS:PAYMENTS OF $100.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: NOV-20-2014 UNTIL: MAR-15-2018. THE AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $100.00. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENT ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Arlene Brown appears as pro per; respondent, Natalya Belousova appears with Russian interpreter Edvim Amzayan and witness Jennifer Willis. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
